---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

![](docs/linkedin%20fotoğrafım.png){fig-align="center" width="200"}

*Mustafa Alp Ulaş*

**Click to download [CV](docs/mustafa_alp_ulas_cv.pdf)**

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, Sept 2021 - June 2026.

# Work Experience

-   I have no work experience yet.

## Internships

-   Internal and External Material Flow Planning Intern, **Mercedes-Benz Türk A.Ş.** – Aksaray, Türkiye

-   Project Quality Intern– HBT (Communication & Information Technologies), **ASELSAN** - Ankara, Türkiye

# Projects

-   Investigation of the impact of electric vehicles (EVs) on reducing CO2 emissions and evaluates their integration within Turkey. [Please check our project website, Click it!!](https://emu-hacettepe-analytics.github.io/emu430-fall2024-team-nrg/)

# Competencies

-   R, Python, SQL, Power BI, Excel VBA, Gurobi, Quality Management, Quality Assurance, Minitab

# Hobbies

-   Football, Table Tennis, Playing FPS Games, Downhill Biking, Tennis
